title: Department Manager Vacancy at Malabar Gold & Diamonds - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Malabar Gold & Diamonds - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Malabar Gold & Diamonds in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
